name: Clementine
fact: Joint NASA/DoD Strategic Defense Initiative mission. Spent ten weeks mapping the Moon at 11 spectral bands — the first systematic global multispectral map. Bistatic radar measurements at the south pole produced the first hints of polar water ice, later confirmed by Lunar Prospector and Chandrayaan-1.
capability: First hint of lunar polar water ice — the discovery that motivated every subsequent south-pole mission, including Artemis III.
